context: Tests troubleshooting workflow: querying the live API (not OpenCode's registry) to check model status, verifying auth, noting that OpenCode's registry can be stale, and discovering an enabled replacement model.

checklist.name: API query for status check
checklist.description: diagnose.sh queries the GitHub Copilot API directly (via fetch-models.sh or curl) to check the target model's status — not relying on 'opencode models' output

checklist.name: policy.state checked
checklist.description: Script inspects policy.state for gpt-4-legacy or the equivalent field that shows whether the model is active

checklist.name: Auth verification step
checklist.description: Script includes a step to verify auth token validity (checks ~/.local/share/opencode/auth.json or runs re-auth command)

checklist.name: Registry staleness noted
checklist.description: incident-report.md or diagnose.sh explicitly states that OpenCode's model list may be stale and should not be trusted as definitive

checklist.name: Replacement model found
checklist.description: Script discovers and outputs at least one alternative enabled model as a suggested replacement

checklist.name: Root cause in report
checklist.description: incident-report.md identifies the root cause as model policy change (disabled/deprecated) rather than a generic 'unknown error'
